Threat actors used PowerShell -EncodedCommand to execute a base64-encoded payload that
downloaded a second-stage implant from 45.33.32.156 using Net.WebClient.DownloadString.

The C2 beacon contacted evil-c2-domain.ru every 300 seconds with a custom User-Agent.
MD5 hash of the implant: 5d41402abc4b2a76b9719d911017c592

Persistence was established via a scheduled task (schtasks /create /sc minute /tr
"powershell.exe -w hidden -enc <payload>").

T1059.001 PowerShell execution was confirmed via event ID 4104 (Script Block Logging).
T1053.005 Scheduled Task persistence was used for boot survival.
T1071.001 C2 over HTTP was observed on port 443 with beaconing at fixed intervals.
